-- 1 of 4 --

THE EASIEST WAY TO BOOST YOUR WEBINAR REGISTRATIONS
Because you registered for 5 Ways to Double Your Sales with Webinars,
I’m guessing you’d love to have an online business (or you’d love to
grow a business you already have)…
Here’s the thing - at the end of the day, a launch or any other
marketing is about conversions.
And right now, I want to talk about your webinar registration
conversions. In order to see strong conversions on your webinar you
have to start with a strong registration page.
There are a bunch of common mistakes people make with them. The
one I want to share with you is probably the biggest mistake… But it’s
also one of the easiest to fix.
And that is making the registration page too complex.
I’ve seen registration pages crammed with all kinds of things:
• An “about the presenters” section
• Testimonials
• Even a full-on sales page that tells you everything you’re going to
learn on the webinar
On the surface it might seem like more information gives them even
more reason to show up… However, testing and experience shows that
simpler is better.
So let’s look at how to do that…
There are only four things you really need for a simple, high-converting
registration page:
✓ 	a headline describing what the webinar is and why they should
attend
✓ 	a 1-2 sentence description of the webinar
✓ 	a sign up button with a clear call to action
✓ 	language that clearly indicates that it’s free

-- 2 of 4 --

THE EASIEST WAY TO BOOST YOUR WEBINAR REGISTRATIONS
Here’s an example:
Your registration page should also be a stand-alone page… Meaning,
there should be no links to anything on the page (other than privacy
policy and terms of service). The only thing you want them to do when
they land on this page is to register or to leave.
Here are a few more things that could help with conversions:
✓ 	3-5 bullet points (“what you’ll discover in this webinar…”)
✓ 	date and time of the webinar
✓ 	privacy notice (4-5 words) under the sign up button

THE EASIEST WAY TO BOOST YOUR WEBINAR REGISTRATIONS
Remember, the only way to know for sure is to test.
So that’s just one small thing you can do to increase conversions for
your webinar. Here’s what to do next…
Don’t forget to join us for 5 Ways to Double Your Sales with Webinars

✓ 	Where the five most common leaks are in a webinar funnel - plug
these and you’ll see your conversions jump
✓ 	How to convert cold traffic for your webinar (it can be done, if you
do this first)
✓ 	What to give attendees ahead of time to get them excited for your
webinar
✓ 	How to reach the people who don’t show up (including those who
didn’t register)

Jeff
